query: Find a surgery facility in Chennai

reasoning.text: Found 38 facilities in Tamil Nadu claiming surgical specialties.
Checking each one — are they actually hospitals with equipment, or clinics overclaiming?

⚠ KP Care Centre in Chennai claims orthopedic surgery and oral surgery — but its own description says 'your Dental health and Bone joint health is our priority.' This is a dental clinic listing surgical specialties. Trust: 0.0.
⚠ KP Care Centre also lists zero equipment. A facility claiming surgery with no equipment on record cannot perform those procedures safely.
✓ Aadhaar Hospital in Tirupur is a verified hospital. Trust: 0.9. Data is consistent with claimed capabilities.

A patient looking for surgery in Chennai could easily find KP Care Centre online. It appears to offer orthopedic surgery. It's actually a dental clinic. Our tool catches that before the patient makes the trip.

warnings.name: KP Care Centre
warnings.reason: Dental clinic claiming orthopedic surgery. Description says 'Dental health is our priority.' Zero equipment listed.
